hero.name: Dr. Maryam Bahrian
hero.subtitle: Clinical Psychologist | Psychotherapist | Researcher
hero.intro: Exploring the mind, language, culture, and the human psyche through the lens of psychoanalysis, clinical research, and therapeutic practice.

about.label: About Dr. Bahrian
about.title: Research, Therapy, and Thought
about.text: Dr. Maryam Bahrian is a clinical psychologist and psychotherapist. Her research lies at the intersection of psychoanalysis, culture, language, and politics. The writings on this website open a window into her clinical reflections, cultural analyses, and psychoanalytic essays.

credentials.title: Professional Credentials
items: PhD in Clinical and General Psychology

about.intro: Dr. Maryam Bahrian is a clinical psychologist, psychotherapist, and researcher in the field of psychology.
